# komodor_cost_right_sizing_policy_presets (Data Source)

Returns the list of supported optimization preset names for komodor_cost_right_sizing_policy.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `names` (List of String) Supported values for optimization_preset (includes "custom").
